string.name: encrypt_option_use_aescrypt_desc
string.value:
AESCrypt is an open source file encryption format based on AES encryption. It is also portable, can be decrypted with AESCrypt programs on other platforms.

AESCrypt website: https://www.aescrypt.com

string.name: encrypt_option_use_azecrypt_desc
string.value: Amaze's Encryption Format is also based on AES encryption; but different from AESCrypt format, it can only be decrypted by this device; also you must not uninstall Amaze File Manager from this device nor change the way you lock screen, otherwise you will have no way to recover the encrypted file.

string.name: ftp_prompt_accept_first_start_saf_access
string.value:
Since this is your first run of the FTP server, and you are using the device's internal storage as shared folder, please allow Amaze to access the storage using SAF.\n\n

You only need to do this once, until the next time you select a new location for sharing.

string.name: grant_all_files_permission
string.value:
Since Android 11, Google requests File Managers to request user permission for managing all files on the device. Details available at https://developer.android.com/training/data-storage/manage-all-files.

Amaze File Manager needs this permission too. After pressing 'Grant', please select Allow access to manage all files option on the next screen.

Canceling this dialog will exit the app.

string.name: smb_instructions
string.value:
How to access shared Windows folder on Android (SMB)



  • Enable File Sharing on Windows

    • Open the Control Panel, click Choose HomeGroup and Sharing options under Network and Internet, and click "Change Advanced Sharing Settings", enable the "File and Printer Sharing" feature.

  • Additional File Sharing settings

    • You may also want to configure the other advanced sharing settings here.
    For example, you could enable access to your files without a password if you trust all the devices on your local network. Once file and printer sharing is enabled, you can open File Explorer or Windows Explorer, right-click a folder you want to share, and select Properties.
    Click the Share button and make the folder available on the network.

  • Make sure both devices are on same Wifi

    • This feature makes files available on the local network, so your PC and mobile devices have to be on the same local network. You can't access a shared Windows folder over the Internet or when your smartphone is connected to its mobile data - it has to be connected to Wi-Fi.

  • Find IP Address

    • Open Command Prompt. Type "ipconfig" and press Enter. Look for Default Gateway under your network adapter for your router's IP address. Look for "IPv4 Address" under the same adapter section to find your computer's IP address.

    Enter details in SMB dialog box

string.name: ssh_authentication_failure_key
string.value: Logon failure: Unable to authenticate with supplied username and private key.

string.name: ssh_authentication_failure_password
string.value: Logon failure: Unable to authenticate with supplied username and password.

string.name: ssh_connect_failed_host_key_changed_message
string.value:
IT IS POSSIBLE THAT SOMEONE IS DOING SOMETHING NASTY!

Someone could be eavesdropping on you right now (man-in-the-middle attack)! It is also possible that the host key has just been changed. The fingerprint for the public key sent by the remote host does not match the one stored in Amaze.

Please contact your system administrator or setup a new connection to continue connecting to the server.

string.name: ssh_connect_failed_host_key_changed_prompt
string.value:
IT IS POSSIBLE THAT SOMEONE IS DOING SOMETHING NASTY!

Someone could be eavesdropping on you right now (man-in-the-middle attack)! It is also possible that the host key has just been changed. The fingerprint for the public key sent by the remote host does not match the one stored in Amaze.

You may proceed with updating host fingerprint or cancel updating SSH connection settings.

string.name: ssh_connect_failed_host_key_changed_title
string.value: WARNING: REMOTE HOST IDENTIFICATION HAS CHANGED!

string.name: ssh_host_key_verification_prompt
string.value:
The authenticity of host '%1$s' can't be established.

%2$s key fingerprint is %3$s.

Please tap "Yes" to confirm identity; otherwise, please tap "No".
